CreateStudyRelation.clientToken: Idempotent token, an ASCII string with a maximum length of 64 characters. For details, see [ClientToken Idempotency](CSN/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
CreateStudyRelation.csnRtId: The ID of the Cloud Smart Network route table
CreateStudyRelation.attachId: The ID of the network instance identity in the Cloud Smart Network
